calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Constantine Panagotacos, Esq., for Plaintiff Mission Housing Development Corporation.
Sam Moss and Jo Anne Kizine sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Frank Kim and Julia Kim.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 219 King Street, San Francisco, CA 94107
Damages $16,939.76
Holdover damages $5,215.01
Attorney's Fees $4,800.00
Costs $499.00
for a Total Judgment of $27,453.77
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court
